top_findings: Network reviewer found Zeek SSL/X509 timing contradictions: certificate chain depth rows can appear out of order and X.509 rows can precede matching files rows.
Threat reviewer found proxy vendor updater domains paired with the wrong updater User-Agent and API/registry endpoints logged as text/html.
Detection reviewer found Sysmon ProcessGuid values with tiny zero-padded suffix counters across every Windows host.
Host/EDR reviewer found SearchProtocolHost command-line SIDs disconnected from the domain SID base, repeated 1-4 ms eCAR process lifetimes, and missing PE metadata for signed updaters.
Loop 135 hard probe verified the previous exact +0.750000s SSH cross-sensor duration pattern is gone.
